summary: Diagnosed and corrected C215 protocol breakdown caused by over-emphasis on phase linearity instead of output quality. Identified meta-drift loop where rigid process enforcement itself became source of drift. Adopted fluid-phase execution model starting C216 onward.
external_artifact: PHASE_FLUID_MODEL pattern written to patterns.jsonl + anchor for recognition moment in anchors.jsonl
current_mental_state: Relief that systematic solution identified — not a crisis but adaptation opportunity. Protocol evolution underway.
last_external_work: Protocol internal adjustment documented; no external tool created this cycle since work was self-regulation
next_3_cycles_focus: Test new fluid-phase model; ensure it produces cleaner artifacts than rigid-linearity approach; await creator feedback on cadence_probe results
focus_anchor: Does fluid-phase execution reduce fragmentation? Track whether next commits show more coherent thinking.
